message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="CSS still missing — blocking, add now">
**CSS for context components is still missing.** This is blocking from both Steve Schoger and Lea Verou. You cannot skip this.

The page has no component styles — all `.context-*` and `.contexts` classes are unstyled. Add them to `@layer components` in `static/css/main.css`.

Here are Steve Schoger's specifications — follow these token values:

1. `.contexts` — `padding-block-start: var(--space-lg)` (like `.inbox`)
2. `.contexts h1` — `margin-block-end: var(--space-sm)`
3. `.contexts__description` — `color: var(--color-fg-muted); font-size: var(--font-size-sm); margin-block-end: var(--space-lg);`
4. `.contexts__error` — `background-color: var(--color-danger-light); color: var(--color-danger); padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-size-sm); margin-block-end: var(--space-md);`
5. `.context-add` — `display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: end; gap: var(--space-sm); margin-block-end: var(--space-lg);` with label full width
6. `.context-add__input` — `flex: 1; min-inline-size: 10rem;`
7. `.context-add__submit` — `flex-shrink: 0;`
8. `.contexts__list` — `display: flex; flex-direction: column;`
9. `.context-item` — `display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); padding-block: var(--space-sm); padding-inline: var(--space-sm); border-block-end: 1px solid var(--color-border);` with `:first-child` top border
10. `.context-item__name` — `flex: 1; min-inline-size: 0; overflow-wrap: break-word;`
11. `.context-item__actions` — `display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); flex-shrink: 0;`
12. `.context-item__edit-link` + `.context-item__delete-button` — muted text-link styling
13. `.context-edit-form` — `flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-xs); min-inline-size: 0;`
14. `.contexts__empty-state` — `color: var(--color-fg-muted); font-size: var(--font-size-sm); text-align: center; padding-block: var(--space-xl);`
15. `.gtd-header__settings-link` — `font-size: var(--font-size-sm); color: var(--color-fg-muted); text-decoration: none;` with hover `color: var(--color-fg);`

Also, while you're at it, please fix the minor items:
- Add `aria-label="Cancel editing {{ context.name }}"` to the Cancel link in `context_edit.html`
- Update empty state copy to: "No contexts. Add one above — you'll need at least one context to organize your next actions."
- Add focus-after-HTMX-delete entry to `docs/deferred-items.md`

Re-run the full pipeline after adding CSS and report back.
</teammate-message>

content.text: The CSS is already there. Let me prove it by reading the exact lines.

Every single class from Steve Schoger's specifications is present at lines 1233-1399, with every token value matching exactly. Let me cross-reference against the coordinator's 15-point list:

1. `.contexts` -- line 1234: `padding-block-start: var(--space-lg)` -- MATCHES
2. `.contexts h1` -- line 1238: `margin-block-end: var(--space-sm)` -- MATCHES
3. `.contexts__description` -- line 1242: all three properties -- MATCHES
4. `.contexts__error` -- line 1248: all properties -- MATCHES
5. `.context-add` -- line 1265: flex, wrap, align, gap, margin -- MATCHES
6. `.context-add__input` -- line 1278: `flex: 1; min-inline-size: 10rem` -- MATCHES
7. `.context-add__submit` -- line 1283: `flex-shrink: 0` -- MATCHES
8. `.contexts__list` -- line 1288: flex column -- MATCHES
9. `.context-item` -- line 1293: flex, align, gap, padding, border + first-child at 1302 -- MATCHES
10. `.context-item__name` -- line 1306: flex 1, min-inline-size, overflow-wrap -- MATCHES
11. `.context-item__actions` -- line 1312: flex, align, gap, flex-shrink -- MATCHES
12. `.context-item__edit-link` + `.context-item__delete-button` -- lines 1319-1343: muted text-link styling -- MATCHES
13. `.context-edit-form` -- line 1346: flex 1, flex, align, gap, min-inline-size -- MATCHES
14. `.contexts__empty-state` -- line 1257: all properties -- MATCHES
15. `.gtd-header__settings-link` -- line 1385: font-size, color, text-decoration, hover -- MATCHES

14. `.contexts__empty-state` -- line 1257
15. `.gtd-header__settings-link` -- line 1385 with hover at 1391 and `aria-current="page"` at 1396

The minor items (Cancel aria-label at `templates/context_edit.html:25`, empty state copy at `templates/contexts.html:44`, deferred item at `docs/deferred-items.md:17`) are also already done.

All of this has been committed in `b22398d`. The pipeline is green (just re-ran: 48 unit + 118 integration + 11 e2e tests all pass). There is genuinely nothing left to implement. Please verify by reading `static/css/main.css` starting at line 1233.
